description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a deep blue exterior with a space-themed design inspired by the game 'Among Us.' The front panel displays the 'Among Us' logo and a crewmate character, while the control panel is decorated with a starry galaxy motif and equipped with two joysticks and multiple buttons, suggesting two-player capability. The screen is set into a rectangular bezel and displays in-game text and graphics, framed by a matching cosmic background. The left side panel features a stylized image of a crewmate with a ray gun, while the right side panel shows a group of colorful crewmates floating in space. The cabinet is constructed in a classic upright style, with a slanted control panel and a tall, boxy profile. No coin slot or marquee artwork is visible, and the back panel is plain and unadorned.
description: A blue, space-themed 'Among Us' arcade cabinet with two joysticks, multiple buttons, and vibrant crewmate graphics on the front and sides.
description_view_0: Left side view showing a crewmate with a ray gun on a dark blue background and the angled control panel with two joysticks.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, solid dark blue back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_2: Right side view featuring a group of colorful crewmates floating in space and the angled control panel with controls visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the 'Among Us' logo, a crewmate graphic, the dual joystick/button control panel, and the screen with in-game text.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen is flat, rectangular, and set into a bezel, but display technology is not visually identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple round buttons arranged side-by-side for two players, with a starry galaxy motif on the panel.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Left side features a crewmate with a ray gun on a starry background; right side shows a group of colorful crewmates floating in space.
